title: Meetings & Voting
subtitle: Votes are weighted by ownership share, the app handles proxies. Minutes are generated from the results.
noVoteManage: Start the first one — written resolutions bring the building together without knocking on doors. The app calculates quorum and shares for you.
noVoteResident: Once the committee starts a vote, you'll get a notification and can vote from your phone.
voteBody: Voting is by written resolution, weighted by ownership share. Required quorum {{quorum}}%, {{voted}}% of shares have voted so far.
myShare: your share {{shares}}% · or grant a proxy:
tenantNoVote: The vote belongs to the unit owner — as a tenant you don't vote. You'll see the result here.
noMeetingManage: Nothing scheduled yet. Most things can be handled by written resolution without a meeting.
autoMinutesBody: Results, shares, and proxies are inserted into the minutes template automatically — you just sign it.

modal.question: What's being voted on
modal.questionPlaceholder: Roof repair on entrance C for 486,000 Kč from the reserve fund
modal.remindersBody: 3 days before the deadline to non-voters, a final call 24h before, and the result with minutes to everyone afterward.
modal.agendaPlaceholder:
2027 budget and service charge amounts
Election of a new committee member

toastVoteCast: Vote recorded, you can change it until the vote closes
toastReminderNoApp: Non-voters don't have an app account — letters will be printed
toastFillDateAndPlace: Fill in the date and location
